creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Enrico,
Based on some symptoms I'd been seeing, I believe 1.5.4 may fix some issues I've seen in production with logstash.

https://github.com/elastic/logstash/commit/71555770fe8e58b93634fa05048f0fcd9df47abf
Lumberjack: Fixed an incorrectly calculated window size of a payload that would make logstash loses events when dealing with congestion ([#3691](https://github.com/elastic/logstash/issues/3691))

Can you look into an update?
